title: polygala helenae
intro: Polygala helenae, also known as Helen's Polygala, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Polygala helenae include its potential to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Polygala helenae is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, and capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
